summary: TOOL_CATEGORIES covers only 22.5% of tools — 62 tools have no category assignment, blocking graph auto-generation
detail: typed-result.ts:225-233 defines 7 categories mapping 18 tools, but there are 80 tools total. Missing categories for roadmap, findings, validation, query, config_context, meta, and most individual tools. Any auto-generated graph needs manual category assignment for 62 tools.

summary: NOT GREENFIELD: 20+ tool pipeline patterns already exist in .txt files, system prompts, and TypedResult framework — the graph codifies existing ad-hoc prose
detail: Every tool .txt file already documents its pipelines in prose (write.txt: 'use Read first', curate-context.txt: 'agents use read_artifact'). TypedResult has suggestedNextTools/nextAffordances/wrapExecute. System prompts teach sequential tool usage. fromOutput() (typed-result.ts:380) is built but never called. The graph formalizes this scattered prose into a structured, queryable single-source-of-truth.
